name: NAD and Redox Restoration Coverage Repair for June 8, 2026
summary: Coverage-repair bundle that stages MIB-626 human NAD augmentation records, NR/NMN/MIB-626/MitoQ no-results trial-watch records, and recent review-boundary context while keeping the track at low-confidence human_functional_benefit.

scope.question: Which known source-completeness gaps for NAD and Redox Restoration need repair, and does resolving them change the coverage verdict or public boundaries?

proposed_changes.summary: Update NAD and Redox Restoration Track Outlook.
proposed_changes.rationale: Refresh the public outlook to include repaired source coverage while keeping the stage, momentum, and confidence unchanged.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: Coverage repair improves source completeness and public watchlist boundaries, but does not change evidence_stage, momentum, or confidence because the new MIB-626 and registry records remain short, no-results, disease-context, review-level, or non-durable.

next_actions: Run source-fidelity, interpretation/forecast, safety-limitations, and taxonomy-mapping reviews.
If approved, publish the staged repair bundle and resume ordinary surveillance for posted NR, NMN, MIB-626, and MitoQ results.
